title: Rustins Danish Oil 250ml - Rich, Natural Glow - Enhances Wood Grain Beautifully, Professional-Grade Finish, Easy DIY Application
features: Deep Wood Nourishment: Rustins Danish Oil penetrates deep into wood, enhancing its natural beauty while providing nourishment that lasts.
Premium Wood Finish: Achieve a professional-grade finish on your wooden surfaces, showcasing the richness of the wood grain with a smooth and elegant appearance.
Versatile Application: Ideal for a variety of wooden items, from furniture to kitchenware, offering comprehensive care and protection.
Easy to Use: The user-friendly formula ensures a hassle-free application, making it perfect for DIY enthusiasts and woodworking professionals alike.
Long-Lasting Protection: This Danish oil not only beautifies but also protects, creating a durable layer that guards against stains, water, and daily wear.
description: From the manufacturer Rustins Danish Oil A unique formulation developed by Rustins that is suitable for all types of wood. It differs from Teak Oil in that it contains special ingredients to give it a low lustre finish. It is an easy to use wipe on finish, which brings out the beauty of the timber and gives a natural, open grained, soft lustrous finish. Ideal for all woods and is excellent on turned woodwork. Rustins Danish Oil conforms to The Articles in Contact with Food Regulations and to the Toys (Safety) Regulations 1995, BS:EN71 Part 3.
